mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate remains below 0.5% and core inflation (CPIAUCSL) is rising month-over-month, the Fed is in an accommodative stance that suppresses real discount rates. This environment drives positive equity valuations and S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:Current FEDFUNDS=0.34% and CPIAUCSL=237.847 indicate accommodative monetary conditions
regime_hint: post-pandemic monetary accommodation with rising inflation
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20-day returns in more than 55% of triggered instances, or Rank IC falls below 0.02 over any rolling 18-month window.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payroll employment (PAYEMS) above 300 thousand signals robust labor market momentum that sustains consumer spending and corporate earnings growth, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Correlation between month-over-month PAYEMS growth and 5-day forward SPX returns is not statistically significant (p > 0.10) over any 2-year rolling window, or direction of relationship reverses.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in housing starts (HOUST) below 1100 thousand units signals weakening demand expectations and reduced future construction employment, which compresses near-term equity valuations and produces negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls below 1100 thousand units for 2 consecutive months
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in more than 50% of triggered instances, or the lagged correlation between HOUST and 60-day forward returns is not significantly negative (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production (INDPRO) growth decelerates below 0.3% month-over-month while the unemployment rate (UNRATE) rises above 5.0%, signaling a supply-side contraction combined with labor market slack. This interaction predicts negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days as growth expectations compress.
failure_condition: Rank IC of the interaction signal is below 0.04 over any rolling 18-month window, or the mechanism fails to predict negative returns in more than 55% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Real retail sales (RSAFS) growth accelerates above 0.8% month-over-month, indicating strong consumer demand that supports corporate revenue growth and equity valuations. This always-on trend signal predicts positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC between month-over-month RSAFS growth and 20-day forward SPX returns falls below 0.03 over any rolling 2-year window, or the relationship becomes significantly negative.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate (UNRATE) rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over a 3-month period, it signals deteriorating labor market conditions that reduce consumer confidence and discretionary spending, producing negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
regime_hint: labor market deterioration or recession onset
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in more than 52% of triggered instances, or the lagged correlation between 3-month UNRATE changes and 60-day forward returns is not significantly negative (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth (GDPC1) decelerates to below 1.5% annualized while the federal funds rate (FEDFUNDS) remains above 0.25%, indicating the Fed is not accommodating slowing growth. This regime-conditional interaction predicts negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days as growth expectations compress.
evidence_refs: fact:Current GDPC1=16442.3 billion chained 2017 dollars and FEDFUNDS=0.34%
failure_condition: Rank IC of the interaction signal is below 0.05 over any rolling 18-month window, or the mechanism fails to predict negative returns in more than 58% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production (INDPRO) accelerates above 0.5% month-over-month while payroll employment (PAYEMS) grows above 250 thousand, signaling robust supply-side expansion and labor demand that supports corporate profitability and equity valuations. This interaction predicts positive S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO month-over-month growth > 0.5% AND PAYEMS month-over-month growth > 250 thousand
failure_condition: Rank IC of the interaction signal is below 0.04 over any rolling 18-month window, or the mechanism fails to predict positive returns in more than 55% of triggered instances.
